test.note: swell-orchestrator tests pass; swell-state has pre-existing import issues

blockingIssues.description: CoderAgent.execute() does not use LLM backend despite having llm field - falls back to simple format string
RefactorerAgent expected behavior 'Validates after refactor' not implemented

appliedUpdates.description: Added missing imports: RiskLevel, StepStatus to test module

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention for test module imports: when test modules use types from parent or sibling modules, they must use full paths (e.g., `use crate::{RiskLevel, StepStatus}`) rather than assuming `use super::*` will bring in all needed types
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: state_machine.rs test module at lines 229-231 uses RiskLevel::Low and StepStatus::Pending but these are not imported, causing compilation failure across all swell-orchestrator tests

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that 'rust-worker' skill name in features.json is incorrect - the actual skill is named 'Rust' (not 'rust-worker')
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features (all 11 agent features) have skillName: 'rust-worker' but .factory/skills/rust/SKILL.md is the actual skill path

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that agents should not use _prompt pattern where SystemPromptBuilder is called but result is discarded
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: CoderAgent, DocWriterAgent, TestWriterAgent, RefactorerAgent all call system_prompt_builder.build() and assign to _prompt without using it
